overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dark industrial space colony. The character walks from a rocky exterior up a metal ramp, crosses an illuminated concrete platform, and enters a facility entrance marked 'Colony of Cydonia'.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior rocky approach to industrial facility

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across rocky terrain toward a lit industrial structure in the distance

entered.detail: reddish rocky ground with scattered stones typical of a planetary surface
dark industrial structure with a circular airlock door and warning markings
tall industrial building with bright spotlights and green indicator lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a dark, rocky planetary surface toward a distant lit facility. A large industrial structure looms on the left while the destination building glows with artificial lights in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal grated ramp between industrial structures

events.description: transitions from rocky ground onto a metal grated ramp leading upward

agents.ego_description: climbing a steep metal ramp toward the upper platform of the facility

entered.detail: steep metal mesh walkway with side railings leading up to the platform

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a metal grated ramp between dark industrial walls. The destination building draws closer as the character climbs higher, with the mesh walkway visible beneath their feet.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated upper platform with cargo storage

events.description: emerges from dark ramp into brightly lit platform area with active floodlights

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide concrete platform toward the facility entrance, passing cargo containers

entered.detail: wide metal and concrete walkway with painted hazard stripes
stacked industrial crates and equipment along the right railing
tall light rigs illuminating the platform with warm artificial light

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide, brightly lit concrete platform. Industrial cargo containers line the right side while powerful floodlights illuminate the area. The destination building now looms large on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: facility entrance corridor with overhead piping

events.description: enters the Colony of Cydonia facility entrance from the exterior platform
character looks upward at the overhead signage and piping

agents.ego_description: walking into the facility entrance and looking up at the industrial architecture and signage

entered.detail: large industrial doorway with metal beams and illuminated interior
massive overhead ventilation ducts and pipes running along the ceiling
yellow sign reading 'COLONY OF CYDONIA TO MAIN AIRLOCK'

segments.scene_description: The character enters the facility entrance, passing from the open platform into a covered corridor. Massive industrial pipes run overhead, and a prominent yellow sign indicates this is the Colony of Cydonia main airlock entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, dark planetary surface into the brightly lit industrial heart of a space colony. It begins with the character traversing a rocky exterior toward a distant, glowing facility while a massive industrial structure looms in the haze. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from natural rock to a metal grated ramp, ascending between dark walls as the destination building draws closer. The scene then opens onto a wide, floodlit concrete platform lined with cargo containers before the camera follows the character into a covered corridor. Finally, the environment transitions from the open air to an interior space characterized by overhead industrial pipes and a prominent yellow sign marking the Colony of Cydonia main airlock entrance.
